---
title: Nasara
format: 
  dashboard:
   orientation: columns
   number_section: false
---

```{R}
#Load packages
if(!require(pacman)) install.packages("pacman")
pacman::p_load(readxl,readr, tidyverse, gt, plotly, reactable, bslib, bsicons, shiny)
```

```{r}
#Load data
LFdata <- read_excel("LF_participant.xlsx")

```

# KEEA Municipal

## Column {width="20%"}

```{r}
#| Content: valuabox
#| title: "Total Number of Paticipant"
list(
  color = "success",
  value = "139") 
```

### Row {.tabset}
:::{.card title="Total Number of Participants"}
```{r}
record_id
```
